response.justification: Bogdan is a highly capable Staff/Senior Software Engineer with a strong dedication to software craftsmanship and backend systems, but he lacks the executive leadership experience required for a CTO role. There is no evidence on his resume of scaling engineering organizations from 10 to 30+ people, communicating with a board of directors, or managing external delivery partners. Furthermore, while he has recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and some fintech experience, he does not possess the deep, production-grade architectural background in high-stakes algorithmic credit and trading systems demanded by this position.
strengths: Extensive experience with backend engineering, distributed systems, and microservices handling high traffic.
Strong advocate for software craftsmanship, utilizing TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development.
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, including Model Context Protocol (MCP) and agentic workflows.
concerns: Lacks executive-level leadership experience and has not demonstrated scaling engineering teams of 10-30+ people.
Missing deep architectural experience in high-stakes, real-time fintech systems like algorithmic working-capital allocation.
No proven track record of managing hybrid engineering models, outsourced teams, or executive board communication.
